title: $helpers object is undefined in Code node
symptom: The Code node script fails when trying to access `$helpers`, resulting in an error indicating that it is not defined.
applies_when: Attempting to access $helpers in the script
not_this_if: No attempt to use $helpers in the script
root_cause: In n8n v1.94.1, the `$helpers` object may not be available in the Code node, leading to errors when scripts attempt to use it for operations like preparing binary data.
fix_steps: Avoid using `$helpers` in the Code node scripts.
Use alternative methods for binary data handling, such as the Convert to File node.
agent_instruction: Remove any references to `$helpers` in the Code node script.
